description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Sync: Moved KOReader sync controls into the reader sidebar with a manual push/pull option
- Sync: Improved tolerance and reliability for KOReader sync operations
- Sync: Added support for more KOReader server implementations
- Fonts: Added support for importing multiple styles within a font family
- Reader: Fixed an issue where footnotes are empty in some EPUB files
- Theme: Applied theme background color for PDFs on macOS
- Reader: Added support for importing AZW3 files on Android
- Reader: Reduced screen flash when launching the app and opening books
- Layout: Fixed an issue where the grouping modal would not appear on Linux
What's Changed
- chore: fix workflow dependency for release by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1874
- fonts: parse font family as well as font style when importing fonts, closes #1876 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1881
- fix: handle some cases where footnote is empty, closes #1880 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1883
- fix: init traffic light properly in library page on macOS, closes #1872 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1891
- theme: fix themed background color for PDFs on macOS, closes #1887 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1894
- chore(deps): bump actions/setup-java from 4 to 5 in the github-actions group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1896
- refactor: use safe insets from native for Android, closes #1793 and closes #1886 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1897
- chore: fix typo by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1898
- fix: close reader window when trying to go to library in separate reader window, closes #1899 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1900
- layout: fix overflow of some font names in custom fonts, closes #1901 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1903
- chore: add 10MB of grace bytes for storage quota by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1904
- refactor: use useFileSelector hook for all file selection by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1905
- fonts: purge custom fonts when reseting fonts config by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1906
- fix: display hidden footnotes, closes #1847 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1907
- refactor(kosync): move kosync into reader sidebar menu and add manual pull/push trigger by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1912
- fix(kosync): normalize xpointer to improve KOReader sync tolerance, closes #1857 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1914
- perf(sync): incremental sync of library books by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1917
- fix: support importing azw3 files on Android, closes #1920 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1921
- fix: reduce screen flash with different background colors when app starts, closes #1915 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1922
- ux: add splash screen for iOS and Android and reduce flash when opening books by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1926
- compat: support more kosync server implementations, closes #1862 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1929
- layout: fix grouping modal not shown on Linux by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1930
- compat: more compat with window insets on Android by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1931
- release: version 0.9.76 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1932
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.75...v0.9.76
